name: core
description: Core package for defining schemas, catalogs, and AI prompt generation for json-render.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 core 相關工作
幫我啟用 core 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 core

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the core skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
